priorities.label: S88 P1 — G3a: in-match NEW COMBO discovery toast (magic-12) + per-match discovered counter
priorities.objective: First formation of a named magic combo in a match -> transient HUD toast 'NEW COMBO — <name>!' on all peers + 'Combos N/12' counter. Deterministic, 1v1-mirror-safe, no protocol bump.
priorities.scope: worldTypes.ts, world.ts, save.ts, gameMode.ts, placePrimitive.ts, comboDiscovery.ts (new), comboToastRenderer.ts (new), ui.ts, main.ts, constants.ts + tests
priorities.testing: pure-pose unit; detection unit (first/same-tick-R1/watermark/functional/first-only); save round-trip + sorted-R2 + keyless-R5; tsc 0; full vitest; bundle <550 KiB; live boot
priorities.check_method: S88 P1 (b0751bf): G3a discovery loop verified by compile+test+boot. UNIT: full vitest 1385/1385 exit 0 (was 1370; +15 = 6 detection + 7 pose + 2 save). tsc -b --noEmit exit 0. comboDiscovery.test.ts: first magic combo stamps comboToastTick+name+counter; functional (Dot->Dot) never toasts; same combo twice does NOT re-stamp (first-this-match); PRIME-AUDIT R1 two DIFFERENT magic combos on one tick -> BOTH names + counter+2; watermark scoping (only bonds id>=firstNewBondId scanned); fresh-world baseline empty. comboToastRenderer.test.ts: pose inactive before/after window + NaN guard (tick-rewind ghost guard), active across window, alpha smooth fade peak 0.95 never exceeded, upper-center band y=0.28H, scale pop-in. save.test.ts: discoveredCombos round-trips SORTED (PRIME-AUDIT R2 canonical), comboToastTick+names round-trip, a keyless snapshot decodes + clears stale local state (PRIME-AUDIT R5 backward-compat, NO protocol bump). DETECTION: single placement-level hook in placePrimitive (firstNewBondId watermark) covers primary+redundancy+merge-sweep + the PLACE_FROM_FREE delegate (confirmed delegates to placePrimitive). BUNDLE: index 557.48 vite-kB = 544.4 KiB < 550 KiB charter (+2.8 KiB eager ComboToastRenderer; kB->KiB x1000/1024 per S87 unit gotcha). LIVE PREVIEW (dev server 25399): clean boot, zero console errors across boot+reload, new renderer mounted, world.discoveredCombos inits empty + comboToastTick undefined at TITLE. Live VISUAL of the toast/counter NOT captured — driving the in-canvas Pixi Solo button via synthetic DOM pointer events did not trigger the federated event flow, and a force gameState='PLAYING' mutation wedged the render loop (harness artifact, recovered by reload); render WIRING confirmed (construct+addChild+sync-in-loop+crash-free) + pose/counter logic unit-proven. G1a DROPPED via PRIME-AUDIT (magic already +2.0 vs +0.25 since S76).

priorities.label: S88 P2 — correct BACKLOG roadmap audit error (magic premium already exists; real gap = G1b)

priorities.check_method: S88 P2 (0709b51): BACKLOG.md corrected. The S86 'honest gap' isMagical row struck through + replaced with the empirical truth (isMagical live at scoring.ts:90; magic +2.0 uncapped vs functional +0.25 capped = 8x since S76, passing test scoring.test.ts:89). G1a struck through + marked DROPPED (S88 PRIME-AUDIT) with the -62%-nerf rationale + the MAGIC_BONUS tuning lever (LOCKED_DECISIONS §6 + constants.lock, playtest-gated). G3a marked SHIPPED S88. Re-read confirms all three edits landed; BACKLOG.md is the S88 MCV-bound watch-root so this edit is diff-bound.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #verify-the-roadmap-against-the-code-before-building (Rule 21/20): the user-mandated roadmap's G1a premise ('isMagical is dead / magic earns no premium') was FALSE — scoring.ts:90 reads isMagical and a magic bond has earned +2.0 vs functional +0.25 (8x, uncapped) since S76, with a passing test. Coding the literal roadmap item (+0.75) would have been a -62% NERF. A state-discovery probe (read the actual scoring + combos source) BEFORE drafting caught it; the gap table had conflated 'magic combos have no BEHAVIORS' (true, = G1b) with 'magic earns no SCORING premium' (false). LESSON: an audit/roadmap claim about code is a hypothesis — ground-truth it with Read+grep before designing on it, even when it's user-authored.

P1 #hook-at-the-confluence-not-per-path: combo-discovery detection needed to cover THREE bond-creation paths in placePrimitive (primary + redundancy + merge-sweep) PLUS the PLACE_FROM_FREE reducer — but placeFromFree delegates to placePrimitive, and all three paths run before the single BOND_FORMED emit. So ONE placement-level hook keyed off a captured firstNewBondId watermark (bonds with id>=watermark) covers everything, vs N fragile per-path hooks. Reused the rainbowSwitchTick (synced-tick + pure-pose, additive-optional, overwrite=restart) AND fouledPrimitives (Set field: init in makeWorld, sorted-serialize, clear on START_GAME/RETURN_TO_TITLE) precedents verbatim — same shape, provably consistent, no protocol bump.

P1 #preview-cannot-always-drive-pixi-input (process): the live-preview VISUAL of the toast/counter was not capturable — Pixi v8's federated event system did not react to synthetic DOM PointerEvents on the canvas (gameState stayed TITLE), and force-mutating world.gameState='PLAYING' on an uninitialized TITLE world WEDGED the render loop (screenshot timed out; recovered by reload). The S87 lesson recurred: harness-synthesized input + artificial state contaminate. LESSON: when the live visual isn't reachable, lean on (a) pure-pose unit tests for the render math, (b) clean-boot + console-error checks for render WIRING, and REPORT the visual gap honestly rather than claim a screenshot that wasn't taken. Don't force engine state the real flow initializes.

P2 #correct-the-source-of-truth-when-it-lies: when a PRIME-AUDIT overturns a roadmap/audit claim, fixing the code is not enough — the wrong claim must be struck FROM the source of truth (BACKLOG.md roadmap) in the same session, with the empirical correction + evidence, so the next session doesn't rebuild on the false premise. Struck the gap-table row, marked G1a DROPPED with the nerf rationale, marked G3a SHIPPED.
